name: American Nuts
description: Creamy vanilla ice cream with crunchy American nuts and chocolate chips in a crispy wafer cone.

name: Boll Top Cone
description: A delicious chocolate ice cream cone generously coated with roasted nuts, offering a satisfying crunch in every indulgent bite.

name: Alphonso Mango
description: Made with the rich flavour of premium Alphonso mangoes, this creamy ice cream delivers a tropical burst of sweetness in every smooth and refreshing scoop.

name: Creamy Bastani
description: Inspired by the rich Persian tradition, Creamy Bastani blends smooth ice cream with pistachios, almonds, and saffron for a luxuriously creamy and aromatic dessert experience.

name: Custard Apple
description: Rich and creamy custard apple ice cream crafted with real fruit goodness for a naturally delicious frozen treat.

name: Jamun
description: Enjoy the bold, tangy sweetness of juicy jamun blended into rich, creamy ice cream for a uniquely refreshing and flavourful dessert experience.

name: Mixed fruit
description: Creamy mixed fruits ice cream packed with vibrant fruity flavours for a refreshing and delicious dessert experience.

name: Thender Coconut
description: Creamy tender coconut ice cream with a light tropical flavour, offering a refreshing and indulgent frozen treat.

name: Authentik Kulfi
description: Experience the timeless taste of traditional Indian Kulfi, crafted with rich khoa and premium dry fruits. Smooth, creamy, and indulgent in every spoonful.

name: Choco Almond Crunch
description: Rich dark chocolate covering, crushed almonds and soft smooth chocolate Ice Cream, giving you a crunchy badabite.

name: Choco Fudge
description: You won’t budge without finishing it to the stick! It’s so soft, smooth and chocolatey that it will rock your world.

name: Cookies 'N' Cream
description: You can never go wrong with Cookies 'N' Cream! A chocolatey crunchy, cookie-packed treat covered witH chocolate.

name: Dark Truffle
description: An overload of creamy dark chocolate that will make you crave more… and more… and more...

name: Mango
description: A royal taste of the king of fruits! Pure pulpy mango Ice Cream that can be indulged in all year round!

name: Red Velvet
description: Enjoy the delicious surprise of red velvet crumbs in each bite! Red Velvet Badabite Candy is here to win hearts and taste buds.

name: Best Chocobar
description: The traditional style chocobar Ice Cream, with a Vadilal promise of ultimate deliciousness!

name: Bomber
description: A crispy crunchy outer layer with chocolate Ice Cream on the inside mixed with a hint of vanilla! An explosion of flavour, it is!

name: Chocobar
description: Pure creamy vanilla on the inside with a chocolatey covering on the outside. It’s wholesome… inside out!

name: Funtastic
description: Chocolatey on the outside, chocolatey on the inside! A crispy, chocolatey layer covered with a chocolatey slab on the inside.

name: One Up Chocobar
description: A chocolatey crust on the outside and creamy, smooth vanilla Ice Cream on the inside. Doubly yummy, indeed!

name: Butterscotch Treat Cone
description: Treat yourself to an Ice Cream cone that is crunchy, tasty and butterscotch-y. We’re drooling already!

name: Choco Vanilla
description: Relish in this fantabulous combination of chocolate and vanilla. It is bound to make you want more.

name: Mini Cone
description: This mini cone is BIG on flavours. Delicious butterscotch, chocolate fudge and a quick fix for all your dessert cravings!

name: Pista
description: What’s not to like when there is salty, crunchy bits of pistachio and a chocolate-topped Vadilal twist.

name: Royal Butterscotch
description: You can never get enough of the royal butterscotch with Vadilal’s touch of crunchy chocolate flakes and syrup.

name: Volcano Chocolate
description: When hunger strikes, oozing melted chocolate wrapped with wafer cones topped with crunchy nuts is the only solution.

name: American Nuts
description: Go nuts the American way! Ice Cream sprinkled with loads of premium nuts.

name: Vanilla
description: An Ice Cream that will taste yum with just about anything.

name: Kesar Badam Cool-Fi
description: The iconic Kesar-Badam combination in Cool-Fi form is to die for! One bite of this delightful combo is sure to make you go wow.

name: Mava Cool-Fi
description: A traditional Indian Ice cream that’s now denser, creamier, and made to appeal to your taste!

name: Rajbhog Cool-Fi
description: A royal blend of premium nuts, with streaks of saffron and cardamom, sprinkled on top of a rich and creamy Ice Cream. Grand!

name: Rajwadi Badam Cool-Fi
description: A rich, creamy ice cream blended with crunchy almonds. It’ll make you say Ba-Damn it’s delicious.

name: Rajwadi Pista Cool-Fi
description: Fresh, creamy Ice Cream topped with the finest selection of pistachios. It’ll make you say pista-ciao to every other flavour.

name: Shahi Pista Cool-Fi
description: A royal treat of creamy condensed milk ice cream topped with grated pistachio and premium nuts.

name: Special Mava Cool-Fi
description: The classic Indian Ice cream is now creamier and richer to tingle your taste buds!

name: Kaju Draksh Special Cup Treat - 90 ml
description: It’s time to go nuts with this combination of cashew and raisin bits.

name: Kesar Pista Cup Treat - 90 ml
description: With premium nuts paired with some saffron streaks, it doesn’t get any desi-er than this.

name: Pista Cup Treat - 55 ml
description: If a sweet green tint is your colour and savoury nuts are your preference, then this pistachio flavour is the one for you.

name: Strawberry Special Cup Treat - 55 ml
description: The classic, refreshing taste of strawberry with a Vadilal twist.

name: Super Butterscotch Cup Treat - 90 ml
description: The crunchy praline sprinkled on a caramelised, buttery serving is what makes this flavour an all-time favourite.

name: Super Vanilla Cup Treat - 55 ml
description: The self-indulgent, creamy flavour that’ll never go out of style.

name: Katcha Pakka Aam Dolly
description: Tangy and raw mango flavoured Ice Cream – a unique treat, like you!

name: Mango Dolly
description: It’s yum..to the core! Juicy mango candy with a heart of creamy ice cream.

name: Raspberry Dolly
description: The deliciousness of raspberry amplified, Vadilal style! Can’t go wrong with this one.

name: American Nuts Flingo Cone
description: What’s an Ice Cream without nuts? Its deliciousness is gonna make you go really nuts.

name: Belgian Chocolate Flingo Cone
description: Authentic Belgian chocolate Ice Cream covered with melted chocolate on top. A heart-melting experience!

name: Choco Brownie Flingo Cone
description: You cannot go wrong with ice cream and brownie! Chocolate flavoured Ice Cream topped with soft and chocolatey brownie.

name: Choco Crackle Flingo Cone
description: The taste of pure chocolate with a pleasant crackling sound all in one. It's chocolatey and crunchy, it's Choco Crackle!

name: Choco Raspberry Crush Flingo Cone
description: Chocolate oozing on top of freshly skimmed milk Ice Cream with a center of raspberry sauce.

name: Chocolate Disc Flingo Cone
description: A disc(o) in your mouth! A chocolate disc on top, sprinkled with freshly grated nuts and chocolate Ice Cream.

name: Cookie Disc Flingo Cone
description: Fall in love with a thick chocolatey disc over Ice Cream sprinkled with chocolate flakes and cookie crumbs.

name: Nutty Butterscotch Flingo Cone
description: Nuts and chocolate toppings on Butterscotch Ice Cream. You’re gonna go NUTS over it!

name: Prime Pista Kesar Flingo Cone
description: Saffron and pistachio flavoured Ice Cream topped with melted chocolate, freshly grated pistachio, and saffron!

name: Strawberry Swirl Cake Flingo Cone
description: Here to make you swirl with delicious strawberry swirled in a wafer cone, sprinkled with cake crumbles and melted chocolate!

name: Black Currant
description: An ice cream so good it’ll electrify your senses! The richness of black currant, now on an Ice Cream stick.

name: Mango
description: The king of fruits now on an Ice Cream stick! It’s juicy and refreshing.

name: Orange Juicee
description: Tangy treats for the soul. Treat yourself to a refreshingly juicy orange Ice Cream!

name: Choco Brownie Dip Cup
description: Wait wait… it’s chocolate ice cream WITH soft chocolate WITH chocolate brownie! Jackpot!

name: Dry Fruit Khazana Cup
description: A treasure trove of premium nuts. Eat your way to crunchy, delightful and the finest Ice Cream.

name: Kesar Mohini Cup
description: Relish your way into the saffron-filled Ice Cream. It’s a uniquely delightful twist for your taste buds.

name: Pistachio Almond Fudge Cup
description: If you’re NUTS about NUTS then welcome to our haven. Pistachio nuts and almond fudge married to create one fabulous ice cream.

name: Silk Chocolate Cup
description: Smoooooth – just like you! Chocolate that’s smooth as silk and melts in the mouth.

name: Badam Pista Kulfi
description: A uniquely flavoured, rich and classy Ice Cream that’s sure to tantalise your tastebuds and make you want more.

name: Rajwadi Kulfi
description: Treat yourself with royalty. Taste, eat, repeat. An Ice Cream loaded in pure royalty with every bite.

name: Alphonso Mango Tub
description: Need we say anything more? The taste of the world’s best mango and the magic of Ice Cream, perfecto!

name: Classic Malai Tub
description: Ice Cream malai maarke! Experience a purely desi, soft and creamy Classic Malai Ice Cream.

name: Falooda Tub
description: Unravel the many layers of this tasteful Ice Cream. It’s yummy and filled with the goodness of Ice Cream, nuts and ultimate deliciousness.

name: Gulab Jamun Tub
description: India’s ever-so-loved dessert with a modern twist. The creamy rich Ice Cream with tender pieces of Gulab Jamun, all in one.

name: Kesar Pista Tub
description: A little bit of royal, a little bit of fun. Streaks of saffron with finely sprinkled pistachio nuts that will make you crave more.

name: Kesar Rasmalai Tub
description: This rich, creamy, and naturally flavoured Ice Cream is a traditional favourite with a unique Vadilal touch that will surely make you crave more.

name: Mahabaleshwar Strawberry Tub
description: Presenting the world-famous strawberries in the best way you can ever enjoy. An Ice Cream that’s irresistible and will never cease to amaze you.

name: American Nuts Tubs
description: The Ice Cream that will make you go nuts! Ice Cream sprinkled with an abundance of premium nuts. Crunchy!

name: Belgian Chocolate Tub
description: The classic, evergreen flavour – rich, tasty and chocolatey – an Ice Cream that can never go wrong.

name: Choco Crakle Tub
description: An overload of chocolate with a pleasant crackling crunch. It’s chocolatey, it’s crunchy, it’s heavenly!

name: Cookies ‘N’ Cream Tub
description: Every ice cream lover's dream combo! Chocolate ice cream laced with cookie chunks!

name: Crunchy Butterscotch Tub
description: Crunchy, buttery, creamy! Butterscotch Ice Cream with crispy and crunchy bites of butterscotch.

name: Rich Cookie Crumble Tub
description: An enticing new Ice Cream loaded with deliciousness and crunchiness in its every bite.

name: Vanilla Brownie Fudge Tub
description: A brownie road within the vanilla snow! Vanilla Ice Cream with moist pieces of brownie. A classic!

name: Artisan Red Velvet Ice Cream Cake
description: It’s fun when you have cake, Ice Cream, and lots of red. That’s right! It’s a Red Velvet Ice Cream Cake!

name: Black Forest Ice Cream Cake
description: A Black Forest Cake for all your blues! The iconic cake, filled with rich and creamy Ice Cream, topped with dark, smooth chocolate flakes.

name: Cassatta Ice Cream Cake
description: A rainbow of flavours topped with choco chips, freshly grated nuts and a base of soft cake – a flavourful delight!

name: Chocolate Chips Ice Cream Cake
description: It’s a cake, it’s ice cream and it’s topped with chocolate chips? Count us in!

name: Chocolate Overload Ice Cream Cake
description: Overloaded with rich and delectable chocolate layered with soft and spongy cake. It’s absolutely irresistible!

name: Golden Fantasy Ice Cream Cake
description: An Ice Cream Cake topped with roasted cashews and almonds – your wish comes true!

name: Double Spin Trooper
description: Vanilla with a twist? A dream come true! Vanilla enhanced with a pulpy swirl.

name: Smiley Launcher Trooper
description: If this doesn’t make you smile, we don’t know what will! Soft, sweet, a little tangy, pineapple-flavoured Ice Cream Candy.

name: Thunderstik Trooper
description: Fruity-Tutti-Frutti – triple the fun! The magical combination of black currant and tutti-frutti in an Ice Cream.

name: American Nuts Jumbo Cup
description: Less is more? Not when we’re talking about a jumbo scoop of Ice Cream laced with fresh fruits, nuts, and jellies! Then, even more, is not enough!

name: Badam Carnival Jumbo Cup
description: Classic Vanilla flavoured Ice Cream sprinkled with caramelized, roasted almonds. Classic, delicious and oh-so-rich!

name: Butterscotch Jumbo Cup
description: An Ice Cream with buttery and caramelised crunch is an old-time favourite. So delicious and tempting, you’ll want to skip your meal!

name: Chocolate Chips Jumbo Cup
description: LOADS of choco chips in a GIANT cup full of chocolate Ice Cream. A treat that will make you say… “give me more!”.

name: Fresh Sitafal Jumbo Cup
description: Enjoy this giant scoop of refreshing fruit Ice Cream all year round. It's rich, creamy and so luscious you are sure to come back for more.

name: Kaju Draksh Jumbo Cup
description: The kaju carnival – versatile! Super crunchy cashew nuts and fresh raisins spread over the smooth silky Vanilla Ice Cream.

name: Rajbhog Jumbo Cup
description: Want to revel in some royalty? Fresh nuts with streaks of saffron and cardamom in one giant scoop of tasty Ice Cream is the way to go!

name: Real Kesar Pista Jumbo Cup
description: Sweet with a hint of spice, is sprinkled with freshly grated pistachio, saffron, and cardamom makes for a combo your palate won’t forget!

name: Rich Chocolate Jumbo Cup
description: The bigger and richer, the better. Especially when it’s chocolate! Indulge in a giant scoop of rich, chocolate overloaded Ice Cream.

name: Vanilla Jumbo Cup
description: Ahh! The evergreen classic. You can’t go wrong with this jumbo scoop of pure, tasty classic Vanilla Ice Cream.

name: Chowpatty Kulfi
description: Who can possibly say no? An Ice Cream inspired by Mumbai’s hotspot. A sweet and creamy treat topped with cardamom and fresh nuts.

name: Kewra Kulfi
description: Made from the extracts of the male flowers of a screw pine tree and sweetened condensed milk Ice Cream, this is a concoction as unique as it gets.

name: Rabdi Kulfi
description: Get ready to be mesmerized with thick, creamy, rich layers of nothing less than deliciousness.

name: Roasted Almond Cup
description: What screams more healthy than some nuts and no sugar? It’s our Roasted Almond Ice Cream!

name: Shahi Anjeer Cup
description: Reward your tastebuds with a royal treat of dried figs and no sugar. Try our Shahi Anjeer now!

name: Vanilla No Sugar Ice Cream Cup
description: The perfect flavour for those who like their Ice Cream guilt-free and sugar-free!

name: Aam Chaska Falala
description: The pure taste of mangoes all year round? Yes, please! The chaska of alphonso mango – delivered!

name: Cassatta Slice
description: Everybody’s favourite combination with multiple flavours and added nuts! Truly irresistible!

name: Cookie Ice Cream Sandwich
description: Bite your way into the blissful world of ‘cookielisciousness’.

name: Ice Cream Sandwich
description: Ah! The ultimate snack! Irresistible ice cream sandwiched between crispy, crunchy chocolate. You can’t have just one!

name: Kesar Matka Kulfi
description: The traditional favourite with a modern touch! Loved by everyone.

name: Alphonso Mango Party Pack
description: Your favourite Alphonso Mango is now in Ice Cream. So, lick, slurp and indulge in your favourite fruit all year, and any time you want.

name: American Nuts Party Pack
description: Why choose one when you can have ‘em all? Your favourite nuts in your favourite Ice Cream.

name: Badam Carnival Party Pack
description: Roasted. Caramelised. Almonds. That’s it. That’s all we have to say!

name: Black Currant Party Pack
description: It’s exquisite and exotic, just like the place you travel to as soon as you take the first bite of this creamy goodness.

name: Butterscotch Party Pack
description: Delve into the rich, creamy and buttery Ice Cream loaded with a caramelised crunch in its every bite.

name: Choco Brownie Party Pack
description: Rich, creamy chocolate Ice Cream with bits of brownie in it? Ready to indulge in it in 3, 2, 1!

name: Chocolate Chips Party Pack
description: The classic combo of chocolate chip and chocolate Ice Cream with Vadilal’s touch of deliciousness. What’s not to love?

name: Cookies 'N' Cream Party Pack
description: Crumbs of cookie sprinkled in a bed of chocolate Ice Cream. It’s a dessert lover’s delight for a reason!

name: Fruit Bonanza Party Pack
description: Something for every family member to enjoy! Bits of fruit in flavourful Ice Cream now available in a party pack.

name: Kaju Draksh Party Pack
description: Crunchy. Creamy. DELICIOUS! Dive into the flavoursome world of cashew nuts and vanilla Ice Cream.

name: Kaju Kishmish Party Pack
description: Fresh cashew and raisin flavoured Ice Cream, the perfect combination for a perfect treat.

name: Kesar Pista Party Pack
description: Premium nuts in every bite is a Vadilal promise! Experience the true desi Ice Cream now in a party pack for you and your family.

name: Pineapple Party Pack
description: Bite into our classic pineapple Ice Cream and share a moment of joy with your loved ones.

name: Rajbhog Party Pack
description: A royal for a royalty like you! Its flavours will ‘raj’ over your  palate and trust us, you won't be able to stop from going for a second serving.

name: Real Kesar Pista Party Pack
description: Ice Cream sprinkled with freshly grated pistachio, saffron, and cardamom makes for a combo you won’t forget!

name: Rich Chocolate Party Pack
description: It’s not just chocolate. It’s a rich chocolate loaded with your favourite flavour - chocolate! Doesn’t that make it your perfect dessert partner?

name: Rose Lychee Party Pack
description: This drool-worthy soft, velvety and real fruit Ice Cream is so delicious and refreshing that you won’t stop eating.

name: Sitafal Party Pack
description: Relish in this rich, creamy and lip-smacking Ice Cream with fine chunks of sitaphal that will surely blow your mind and captivate your senses.

name: Strawberry Party Pack
description: It’s sweet. It’s tasty. It’s strawberry! The delightfully fruity Ice Cream is ready to be the star of your next gathering!

name: Tuti Fruity Party Pack
description: A fruitalicious Ice Cream that will blow you away with its flavour and texture.

name: Vanilla Klassic Party Pack
description: An all-time favourite of every household, the Vanilla Klassic Ice Cream will keep your taste buds happy anytime, anywhere!

name: Vanilla Party Pack
description: No ifs, no buts, a perfect classic and a family favourite. An Ice Cream you can eat anyway you like and with whatever you like.

name: Badam Pista Kesar - 500 gms
description: The perfect combination of almonds, saffron and pistachio - the Shrikhand that will leave you licking your fingers.

name: Badam Pista Kesar Shrikhand - 200 gms
description: The perfect combination of almonds, saffron and pistachio - the Shrikhand that will leave you licking your fingers.

name: Elaichi Shrikhand - 200 gms
description: Delectable Elaichi Shrikhand with a special Vadilal signature touch – give me more!

name: Elaichi Shrikhand - 500 gms
description: Delectable Elaichi Shrikhand with a special Vadilal signature touch – give me more!

name: Kesar Shrikhand - 200 gms
description: Saffron-flavoured Shrikhand for the ones who enjoy a healthy dose of sweetness in just about everything.

name: Kesar Shrikhand - 500 gms
description: Make those boring meals tasty and healthy at the same time with our saffron rich flavoured Shrikhand.

name: Mango Shrikhand - 200 gms
description: The magic of mango all year round blended into the ultimate sweet! Enjoy mango-flavoured Shrikhand anytime, anywhere.

name: Mango Shrikhand - 500 gms
description: The magic of mango all year round blended into the ultimate sweet! Enjoy mango-flavoured Shrikhand anytime, anywhere.

name: Chocolate Cup
description: Our classic chocolate Ice Cream with a sprinkle of choco chips in a convenient cup is the answer to all your woes!

name: Strawberry Cup
description: It’s very berry good. Don’t believe us? Try it yourself and get lost in the flavourful strawberry Ice Cream in a cup.

name: Chocolate
description: We took the classic flavours for a spin and came back with a delightful melody that is delicious, convenient and just as iconic!

name: Rainbow
description: A medley of flavours worthy of being your go-to Ice Cream for when you’re in the mood for a dessert that will light up your day.

name: Strawberry
description: A swirl of classic strawberry and vanilla Ice Cream. Dig in and enjoy a classic Ice Cream with a Vadilal spin!
